description_long: This is a freestanding commercial kiosk branded with Corona Extra, designed primarily for promotional or retail use. The front features a slatted black panel with the Corona Extra logo and the word 'RECICLADO' vertically, suggesting an eco-friendly or recycled theme. At the top, a vertical sign displays a Corona Extra bottle and logo, serving as an eye-catching advertisement. The sides are finished in a light wood texture, with one side displaying a black crown emblem, while the back is plain with a large white panel. The structure appears to be made of wood and composite materials, with a sturdy, box-like form and a flat top surface suitable for placing items or products.
description: A Corona Extra-branded kiosk with a slatted black front, light wood sides, and a prominent bottle sign on top. The design is modern and functional, with clear branding and a flat top surface.
description_view_0: The front view shows the slatted black panel with the Corona Extra logo, 'RECICLADO' text, and the prominent bottle sign above.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the light wood finish and a black crown emblem, with the top sign visible in profile.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a plain, large white panel with minimal detailing and the back of the top sign.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the uninterrupted light wood texture and the side profile of the top sign.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign and logo; bottle cutout and Corona Extra branding above the kiosk and on the front slatted panel; 'RECICLADO' text vertically on the front.
attribute_roof_design: Flat top with a vertical sign extension; no overhangs or decorative roof elements.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern commercial with minimalist branding elements.
